AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description: Provides tools for controlling the QuietGuard on-device firewall, lockdown mode, per-app internet access, and recent blocked connections. Operational Patterns: - Use 'searchApps' to resolve an app package name before calling 'getAppFirewallStatus' or 'setAppInternetBlocked'. - Use 'getFirewallStatus' before changing global firewall or lockdown state. - When 'setFirewallEnabled' returns a confirmationIntent, the user must approve VPN access in the app UI. Constraints: - Enabling the firewall requires VPN permission granted by the user. - Per-app changes apply to Wi-Fi, mobile data, or both. - Blocked connection history is limited to 20 entries per request.
